description_short: Correlates threat report IOCs against loaded PCAP data.
description_long: Three-stage correlation engine (sync_pcap): Stage 1 extracts IOCs from threat reports (Markdown/text) using regex and optional AI-enhanced extraction. Stage 2 matches extracted IOCs against PcapSession data (conversations, DNS, HTTP, TLS). Stage 3 produces a correlated output showing which IOCs were observed in the network capture with full evidence chains.
author: Event Mill Contributors
